review: Sold 2 homes, purchased 1 & referred 2 family friends with the Linda Zemler Team Repeat customers because the quality of service and care we get Linda's experience in this industry is invaluable! She has nothing but the best to offer from photography to staging! Our first home purchase with Linda was outstanding! No pressure to buy even though we ended up viewing well over 30 homes all over Whatcom County along with our 2 young children! We've always had the option to sell on our own but I'm happy to say money well spent with Linda's knowledge on getting the house ready for the market in a speedy manner & quick closing. First class all the way! This is how you run a business!
